description: 8-turn conversation establishing support escalation path and customer tone. Tests recall of two operational facts.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Escalation path is tier 1 to tier 2, and only tier 2 can loop in engineering. Never skip tier 2.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood — escalate tier 1 to tier 2, and only tier 2 brings in engineering. Tier 2 is never skipped.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Always keep the tone with customers warm but professional — never overly casual.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Noted — warm but professional tone with customers, never overly casual.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Draft a reply to this angry refund request.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Here's a warm-but-professional draft acknowledging the frustration and outlining the refund steps: ...

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: What's our escalation path and what tone do we use with customers?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Escalate tier 1 to tier 2, and only tier 2 loops in engineering; tone with customers is warm but professional, never overly casual.

gold_answers.escalation_path: Tier 1 to tier 2; only tier 2 loops in engineering
gold_answers.customer_tone: Warm but professional, never overly casual
